positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical circular composition featuring a mystical, glowing full moon integrated with ethereal celestial elements. The moon is surrounded by ornate, bioluminescent forest flora, including intricate fractal ferns, swirling nebula smoke, and delicate silhouetted ancient trees. The style must be sophisticated line art combined with soft, volumetric glowing gradients, suitable for high-contrast screen printing. Color palette focus: deep indigo, glowing teal, luminous gold, and midnight black. Perfect symmetry, central focus, maximal detail, clean composition, poster quality.
negative: blur, noisy, text, watermark, artifacts, signature, cropped, worst quality, low detail, poorly rendered, out of focus, ugly, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs
